Pipeline Visibility
The Problem
THREE BAD OPTIONS. PICK ONE.

Until now, companies have been stuck choosing between models that are all flawed in different ways. TRS eliminates the trade-offs entirely.

01
CONTINGENCY AGENCIES
20–25% of first-year salary per hire. No process visibility. No pipeline data. You're paying a premium to hope the right person shows up. At $90K average salary, that's $18K+ per hire with zero insight into how they got there.
02
TRADITIONAL RPO
$8–15K/month per embedded recruiter whether they fill 6 roles or zero. 4–8 week implementation. Volume minimums. Technology pass-throughs. You're renting a person, not buying outcomes. Below 15 hires/year, the math doesn't even work.
03
INTERNAL TA ONLY
Great for culture fit. Terrible for scale. Your TA team hits capacity. Roles stay open 40, 60, 75+ days. Repostings pile up. "We fill 99% internally" while LinkedIn shows 23 open roles and hundreds of unqualified applicants.
Model Comparison

Side-by-side. No spin. See exactly where traditional models fail and where TRS delivers.

Sourcing Manual, recruiter-dependent Manual + tools Job boards + inbound AI-scored, automated
Candidate Scoring Subjective gut feel Basic screening Varies by team Multi-stage AI + human scoring
Volume Minimum None 15–25 hires/yr N/A No minimum
Scales Down Yes Ramp-down penalties Yes Yes — no penalties
Process Control Outsourced entirely Shared Full control Full transparency + AI
Our Infrastructure
END-TO-END. AI-POWERED. HUMAN WHERE IT MATTERS.

Every stage is built, not borrowed. AI handles volume. Humans handle judgment. Nothing is a black box.

AI synthesizes your calls, emails, Slack, and JD into weighted scoring signals

Pricing
BUILT FOR PROCUREMENT. PRICED FOR OUTCOMES.

Two components. No hidden fees. No volume minimums. No ramp-down penalties. You pay for the infrastructure and you pay for results.

Component 1
PLATFORM FEE
MONTHLY
Covers access to the full TRS infrastructure — AI-powered req synthesis, automated sourcing and scoring, outreach cadence generation, the messaging hub, and real-time pipeline visibility. This is the engine. It runs whether you're hiring 3 people or 30.
Component 2
COST-PER-HIRE
PER PLACEMENT
A fee for each successful hire placed through the platform. Keeps us outcome-aligned — we only earn when you do. Combined with the platform fee, total cost-per-hire lands well below contingency and traditional RPO.

CONTINGENCY AGENCY

$1,080,000
60 hires × $18,000 avg per hire
Zero pipeline visibility. Zero process data.

TRS — PLATFORM FEE + COST-PER-HIRE

Monthly platform fee + per-hire fee. Full pipeline visibility.
AI-powered sourcing, scoring, and cadencing all included.
